title: John Deere Kids 736 47353 Lights & Sounds Tractor with Wagon, red
features: JOHN DEERE MONSTER TREADS: Make your mark on the landscape with the John Deere Monster Treads! This large 8 Inch, and up to 15 Inch scalable tractor toy with bouncy wheels, will provide children hours of tractor toy fun!
FEATURES 3 INTERACTIVE BUTTONS: This kids tractor toy features 3 buttons on top of the cab to activate realistic sounds for tractor toy fun like the ones in real life!
ENCOURAGE CREATIVE PLAY: Ready to tackle any obstacle that lies in their path, Monster Treads are the ultimate in off-road vehicle play - perfect to encourage imaginative play and outdoor play!
FEATURES: This kids toy features super bouncy tyre treads and an attachable wagon. This vehicle toy is made of plastic and is 100% children-safe. Batteries are required and included
IDEAL FOR BUDDING FARMERS: Ideal gift to introduce children to tractors and farm toys in general, suitable for children, boys and girls from 3 years of age
